title: angelonia pilosella
intro: Angelonia pilosella, also known as Angelica, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Asia, belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and easing respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Angelonia pilosella include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
